title: aesculus californica
intro: Aesculus californica, also known as California buckeye, is a deciduous tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the horse chestnut family (Aesclepiadaceae). The medicinal properties of Aesculus californica include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing swelling and pain, treating wounds, and supporting cardiovascular health due to its high levels of flavonoids and saponins. Aesculus californica can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
